facebook.caption:
530 reviews. Every single one a 5-star. That doesn't happen by accident.

Into The Blue on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the snorkeling boat trip locals and long-term visitors keep recommending. Crystal water, coral reefs, and a crew that actually knows what they're doing. No price data needed when the rating speaks this loud.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the anchor drop and the masks go on. Into The Blue's boat clears the harbor and the reef appears fast. 530 five-star reviews. Jump in and see why.
